impact: This removes the blocked checkbox from daemon task selection so independent fixture-first work can continue, while preserving the failed extractor work as deferred context and giving the daemon smaller validation-first recovery targets after repeated py_compile SyntaxError failures.
summary: Park the repeatedly failing solar extractor implementation checkbox outside the selectable checklist and append narrower syntax-guard recovery tasks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-78: Add the solar permit requirement extractor as a no-dataclass one-file implementation only after the syntax-first import test and seven-record fixture pass; expose plain functions/constants and avoid broad contract rewrites.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
